item.title: Boy With Severe Autism Neglected by Care Workers
item.description: A case involving a boy with severe autism and alleged neglect by care workers, highlighting concerns around care and accountability.

item.title: The Peggy Carr Case: A Family's Nightmare
item.description: A look at the Peggy Carr case, focusing on the family’s experience and the unanswered questions surrounding the investigation.

item.title: Partial Confessions Helped Solve Her Case

item.title: A Husband’s Case Raises Serious Questions
item.description: A factual look at a husband’s case and the questions it raises, focusing on the investigation and what remains unclear.
